name: tautulli
compose:
name: slashnode-tautulli
services:
  web:
    image: linuxserver/tautulli:2.17.2
    container_name: tautulli
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - web_data-config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8212:8181
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-config:
    name: slashnode-tautulli_web_data-config
